title: Kotumsar Cave
tagline: Kotumsar Cave — heritage city of Chhattisgarh

overview.short: Kotumsar Cave is a limestone cave located near Jagdalpur in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.
overview.description: Kotumsar Cave is a limestone cave located near Jagdalpur in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh. It is situated on the Kanger limestone belt close to the bank of the Kanger River and lies within Kanger Valley National Park. The cave contains a main tunnel of approximately 200 metres with several lateral and downward passages. It is the longest cave present in Indian subcontinent.

topPlaces.name: Darbha, Chhattisgarh
topPlaces.description: Darbha is a town in Bastar district, Chhattisgarh, India.

topPlaces.name: 2013 Naxal attack in Darbha valley
topPlaces.description: On 25 May 2013, Naxalite insurgents of the Communist Party of India (Maoist) attacked a convoy of Indian National Congress leaders in the Jhiram Ghati, Darbha Valley in the Sukma district of Chhattisgarh, India. The attack caused at least 27 deaths, including that of former state minister Mahendra Karma and Chhattisgarh Congress chief Nand Kumar Patel.

topPlaces.name: Teerathgarh Falls
topPlaces.description: The Thirathgarh Falls is an all season tourism site and well-photographed waterfall near Jagdalpur at Kanger Ghati in Bastar district in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.

items.note: Darbha is a town in Bastar district, Chhattisgarh, India.

On 25 May 2013, Naxalite insurgents of the Communist Party of India (Maoist) attacked a convoy of Indian National Congress leaders in the Jhiram Ghati, Darbha Valley in the Sukma district of Chhattisgarh, India. The attack caused at least 27 deaths, including that of former state minister Mahendra Karma and Chhattisgarh Congress chief Nand Kumar Patel.
The Thirathgarh Falls is an all season tourism site and well-photographed waterfall near Jagdalpur at Kanger Ghati in Bastar district in the Indian state of Chhattisgarh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kotumsar Cave?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kotumsar Cave is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kotumsar Cave?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (187 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (192 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kotumsar Cave?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kotumsar Cave at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kotumsar Cave?
faq.a: Stays in Kotumsar Cave start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kotumsar Cave?
faq.a: The top attractions are Darbha, Chhattisgarh, 2013 Naxal attack in Darbha valley, Teerathgarh Falls.
